plan_summary.primary_goal: Establish a community clay workshop near Katuaq Cultural Centre in Nuuk, operational by 2026-09-15, surviving Year 1 within a 2,000,000 DKK budget under the 'Builder's Balance' low-risk strategy.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the Year-1 budget surplus after ring-fencing the 15% contingency; the monthly off-peak rental revenue against monthly utility overhead; and the Taster-Session conversion margin against the 15% target. Greenlandic labor-law contractor viability, commercial lease execution by 2026-07-01, and Nuuk utility-variance approval by 2026-08-15 are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Year 1 total budget
key_values.comment: Year 1 capital and operating ceiling under the Builder's Balance strategy.
key_values.source_text: Year 1 budget envelope: 2 million DKK — initial capital and operating ceiling.

key_values.label: Ring-fenced contingency share of Year 1 budget
key_values.comment: 15% of the Year 1 budget is ring-fenced as an untouchable operating contingency; depletion below zero triggers loss of operational agility.
key_values.source_text: Contingency reserve amount: 15% of the total Year 1 budget — operational buffer size.

key_values.label: Minimum viable off-peak hourly rental rate
key_values.comment: 165 DKK/hour is the floor needed for off-peak studio rentals to cover direct utility/heating overhead; below this the rental stream is loss-making.
key_values.source_text: Target minimum hourly rental rate for non-enrolled users: 165 DKK/hour — sensitivity driver for off-peak revenue.

key_values.label: Taster-Session conversion target
key_values.comment: Free Taster Sessions must convert 15% of attendees to paying memberships or courses within 90 days to secure year-round local patronage.
key_values.source_text: Conversion Rate Target: 15% of Taster Session attendees convert to course/membership within 90 days.

key_values.label: Year 1 operating months
key_values.comment: Standard 12-month accounting horizon for Year 1 from operational readiness on 2026-09-15.
key_values.source_text: Operational readiness targeted for September 15, 2026, with foundational setup activities commencing immediately.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Monthly fixed operating cost (staffing, rent, admin, utilities, materials amortised)
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to test whether the 2,000,000 DKK Year 1 envelope (less the 15% contingency) covers 12 months of fixed operations under the Builder's Balance staffing model.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum monthly instructor pay (2 FTE-equivalent across 4 part-time roles) + lease + heating/utilities + admin + materials amortisation; cross-check against the implicit 142K DKK/month ceiling implied by 1.7M DKK / 12 months.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Available off-peak studio hours per month (Nov–Feb)
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Denominator for the off-peak rental revenue calculation; pairs with the 165 DKK/hour rate and low-season utilization to project revenue against utility overhead.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Total weekly open-studio hours × 4.33 weeks/month; subtract instructor-led course hours to isolate genuinely available rental capacity.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Actual off-peak studio utilization share (Nov–Feb)
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Risk 1 names speculative off-peak hourly rentals as the most fragile revenue assumption; this fraction determines whether the rental stream covers utility overhead.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Per Data Item 2 trial: one-month dual-pricing test at 165 DKK/hr; project Nov–Feb utilization based on observed local demand at that rate.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Monthly utility overhead during low season
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Benchmark against which off-peak rental revenue must clear; Review Issue 1 names utility volatility as the largest variable-cost risk.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Confirmed Nuuk commercial DKK/kWh tariff × estimated kWh/month for centralized kiln + drying + workshop heating during Nov–Feb.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Taster-Session conversion share
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below the 15% target the local membership pipeline starves and winter revenue collapses; the Expert Criticism gate at <12.5% triggers Taster budget redirection to digital outreach.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Track 30-day and 90-day conversions across early Taster cohorts; sensitivity to local-group reach and follow-up intensity.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total Year 1 fixed operating cost
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Aggregates the monthly burn over the 12-month Year-1 window so the net surplus against the post-contingency envelope is one subtraction.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Year 1 budget surplus after ring-fencing contingency
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests the central financial claim that 1.7M DKK (2M minus the 15% ring-fenced contingency) is enough to cover 12 months of Year-1 fixed operations under the Builder's Balance staffing model.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Projected monthly off-peak rental revenue
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Materialises the speculative off-peak rental revenue stream flagged as the most fragile assumption (Risk 1, Expert Issue 2); needed for the overhead-coverage gate below.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Monthly off-peak rental margin against utility overhead
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin means the 165 DKK/hr off-peak rental stream covers utility/heating overhead during the Nov–Feb shoulder season; negative margin forces the pivot to low-margin co-op slots (Mitigation Plan).

recommended_first_calculations.label: Taster-Session conversion margin against the 15% target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Below zero the local membership pipeline starves the winter revenue base; below the Expert-Criticism 12.5% cut-off the entire Taster outreach budget must redirect to digital assets.

unmodelled_gates.label: Greenlandic labor law permits the part-time contractor staffing model
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Expert Issue 3 and Risk 4 name this as the single most critical staffing assumption; if Greenlandic labor law mandates employee classification, fixed labor cost rises 20–35% and consumes 60–90% of the contingency before any operational stress.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Fixed labor cost rises 20–35% in Year 1, exhausting 60–90% of the 300K DKK contingency and delaying essential infrastructure improvements; staffing must pivot to a salaried model with full severance exposure.

unmodelled_gates.label: Commercial lease near Katuaq secured by 2026-07-01
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without a lease executed by 2026-07-01 the 10-week fit-out cannot complete by the 2026-09-15 operational readiness target; the Q3 peak revenue window slips and Year-1 revenue mix assumptions collapse.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Operational readiness slips past 2026-09-15; Year-1 revenue base loses the Q3 peak; material-buffer order may auto-reduce to 3 months per the Expert Criticism gate, weakening supply-chain resilience.

unmodelled_gates.label: Nuuk municipal utility variance approved by 2026-08-15
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: C1 zoning requires an 8–12 week variance review for the high-draw centralized kiln; without approval by 2026-08-15 the kiln cannot operate at planned load and the fit-out must stop to avoid rework.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Up to 6 weeks delay to full capacity, ~150,000 DKK in lost revenue per Risk 4; potential pivot to the industrial-zone Location 3 with cultural-visibility tradeoffs.
